title: Monulite
description: This mod adds one ore to your world! Monulite! Monulite can be used for tools, magic items, or money! The choice is your my friend
body:
This mod adds a new ore to the game called Monulite.This new ore is very rare, found in the depths of your world! It can be found from y 10 to -60!

![The pickaxes useable for Monulite Ore!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e47477e7aa8af00cab23efe1cb7700ece14d03da.png)

You can make some magical items with this new ore. But in order to do that, you must crush the Raw Monulite into a Powder. This can be done in a normal crafting grid of any kind. In order to make the Magic Infuser you need 4 bricks, 1 monulite ingot, and 3 iron bars. Here is the recipe

![Magic Infuser Recipe!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f7856f23e8cc1d37333db4b149dd5eb63c3edec.png)

If you combinde a Monulite Boot and a Feather you can get a special new pair of boots! If you use Powder and a Steak you can find another cool thing, Or a Golden Carrot, or a Relic disc! There will be more things later on. But for now thats all!
